html:
The Dapper Vest is a Dress item. It requires 8 Hound's Tooth and 6 Silk to craft and an Alchemy Engine to prototype. The Sewing Kit repairs 50% of its durability.

It restores 3.3 Sanity/min while worn.

It is a tier 1 warm clothing, increasing the time a character can be without a fire during the Winter before Freezing. It has an insulation factor of 60, the same as the Rabbit Earmuffs and the Breezy Vest, but provides more sanity restoration.

The Dapper Vest can be used to craft the Hibearnation Vest.

Usage

×2

Trivia

  • The Dapper Vest was added in the The Birds and the Bees & Dogs That Want to Kill You update.
  • The Dapper Vest requires Hound's Teeth to make because its pattern is called houndstooth. This is a pun by the developers.
  • Because the Dapper Vest restores 3.3 Sanity/min and Rain drains a maximum of 3.3 Sanity/min, the Dapper Vest can be used to negate or reverse the Sanity drain of Rain.
  • The Dapper Vest is one out of the two best Sanity restoring body items in the game, excluding the RoG exclusive Hibearnation Vest.
  • Along with several other clothing items, the Dapper Vest used to not have any durability.

Gallery

  • Original HD icon from Bonus Materials from CD Don't Starve.
  • Wilson wearing a Dapper Vest.
  • Willow wearing a Dapper Vest.
  • Wolfgang wearing the Dapper Vest.
  • Wendy wearing a Dapper Vest.
  • WX-78 wearing a Dapper Vest.
  • Wickerbottom wearing a Dapper Vest.
  • Woodie wearing a Dapper Vest.
  • Wes wearing a Dapper Vest.
  • Maxwell wearing a Dapper Vest.
  • Wigfrid wearing a Dapper Vest.
  • Webber wearing a Dapper Vest.
  • Walani wearing a Dapper Vest.
  • Warly wearing a Dapper Vest.
  • Wilbur wearing a Dapper Vest.
  • Woodlegs wearing a Dapper Vest.
  • Wilba wearing a Dapper Vest.
  • Wormwood wearing a Dapper Vest.
  • Wheeler wearing a Dapper Vest.
  • Winona wearing a Dapper Vest.
  • Wortox wearing a Dapper Vest.
  • Wurt wearing a Dapper Vest.
  • Dapper Vest as seen in the poster for the The Birds and the Bees & Dogs That Want to Kill You update.

"sweatervest"
“This vest is dapper as all get-out.”
–Wilson
“Not as nice as a flaming vest, but it'll do.”
–Willow
“Is vest with pattern for fancy man.”
–Wolfgang
“I can wear pieces of dead things made into a vest!”
–Wendy
“VEST HAS HIGH DAPPERNESS QUOTIENT”
–WX-78
“This vest screams "stylish, but well-read."”
–Wickerbottom
“It's not plaid, but it'll do.”
–Woodie
“It's no three-piece, but it's dapper enough.”
–Maxwell
“The hound's tooth has proven quite comfortable. Interesting...”
–Wagstaff
“It is a handsöme vest, but it öffers nö prötectiön.”
–Wigfrid
“It itches and fits funny.”
–Webber
“I hope none of my surfer buds see me in this.”
–Walani
“I feel so much better all of the sudden.”
–Warly
“Fit fer a swab.”
–Woodlegs
“MAKETH WILBA LOOK'TH NICE”
–Wilba
“Warm”
–Wormwood
“All dressed up and ready for adventure.”
–Wheeler
“A vest fit for an egghead.”
–Winona
“I'm not against trying new looks.”
–Wortox
“Scale-less wear so many clothes.”
–Wurt
“This doesn't look like good adventuring wear.”
–Walter
“It looks like something a pretentious old professor might wear.”
–Wanda
The Dapper Vest is a Dress item. It requires 8 Hound's Tooth and 6 Silk to craft and an Alchemy Engine to prototype. The Sewing Kit repairs 50% of its durability.
It restores 3.3 Sanity/min while worn.
It is a tier 1 warm clothing, increasing the time a character can be without a fire during the Winter before Freezing. It has an insulation factor of 60, the same as the Rabbit Earmuffs and the Breezy Vest, but provides more sanity restoration.
The Dapper Vest can be used to craft the Hibearnation Vest.

×2
Trivia[edit | edit source]
The Dapper Vest was added in the The Birds and the Bees & Dogs That Want to Kill You update.
The Dapper Vest requires Hound's Teeth to make because its pattern is called houndstooth. This is a pun by the developers.
Because the Dapper Vest restores 3.3 Sanity/min and Rain drains a maximum of 3.3 Sanity/min, the Dapper Vest can be used to negate or reverse the Sanity drain of Rain.
The Dapper Vest is one out of the two best Sanity restoring body items in the game, excluding the RoG exclusive Hibearnation Vest.
Along with several other clothing items, the Dapper Vest used to not have any durability.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Vest Dapper là một trang phục. Nó cần 8 Răng Chó Săn và 6 Tơ để chế tạo và Máy Luyện Kim để tạo nguyên mẫu. Bộ May vá sửa chữa 50% độ bền của nó.

Interesting... |wigfrid = It is a handsöme vest, but it öffers nö prötectiön. |webber = It itches and fits funny. |walani = I hope none of my surfer buds see me in this. |warly = I feel so much better all of the sudden. |woodlegs = Fit fer a swab. |wilba = MAKETH WILBA LOOK'TH NICE |wormwood = Warm |wheeler = All dressed up and ready for adventure. |winona = A vest fit for an egghead. |wortox = I'm not against trying new looks. |wurt = Scale-less wear so many clothes. |walter = This doesn't look like good adventuring wear. |wanda = It looks like something a pretentious old professor might wear. |choose = wilson}} The '''Dapper Vest''' is a [[Dress]] item. It requires 8 [[Hound's Tooth]] and 6 [[Silk]] to craft and an [[Alchemy Engine]] to prototype. The [[Sewing Kit]] repairs 50% of its durability. It restores 3.3 [[Sanity]]/min while worn. It is a ''tier 1'' warm clothing, increasing the time a character can be without a fire during the [[Winter]] before [[Freezing]]. It has an [[Freezing#Mechanics|insulation factor]] of 60, the same as the [[Rabbit Earmuffs]] and the [[Breezy Vest]], but provides more sanity restoration. The Dapper Vest can be used to craft the [[Hibearnation Vest]]. == {{Pic32|Icon Tools}} Usage == {{Recipe |item1 = Dapper Vest |count1 = 1 |item2 = Thick Fur |count2 = 1 |item3 = Rope |count3 = 2 |result = Hibearnation Vest |tool = Alchemy Engine}} == {{Pic32|Placeholder}} Trivia == * The Dapper Vest was added in the ''[[Don't Starve/Version History#The Birds and the Bees & Dogs That Want to Kill You|The Birds and the Bees & Dogs That Want to Kill You]]'' update. * The Dapper Vest requires Hound's Teeth to make because its pattern is called [[Wikipedia:Houndstooth|houndstooth]]. This is a pun by the developers. * Because the Dapper Vest restores 3.3 Sanity/min and [[Rain]] drains a maximum of 3.3 Sanity/min, the Dapper Vest can be used to negate or reverse the Sanity drain of Rain. * The Dapper Vest is one out of the two best Sanity restoring body items in the game, excluding the ''RoG'' exclusive [[Hibearnation Vest]]. * Along with several other clothing items, the Dapper Vest used to not have any durability. {{clear}} == {{Pic32|Blueprint}} Gallery == CD sweatervest.png|Original HD icon from Bonus Materials from [[CD Don't Starve]].
